name: maestro-skills
description: Interactive setup for the Maestro skill orchestrator (multi-agent)
author: Yuri Rodovalho

scripts.test: npm run test:py && npm run test:js
scripts.publish:cli: node scripts/sync-skill-to-cli.mjs && npm publish --prefix packages/maestro-skills --access public
scripts.publish:scoped: node scripts/sync-skill-to-cli.mjs && npm publish --prefix packages/rodovalhofs-maestro --access public
